CHARACTER PROFILE

╰─..★.──────────╯

☔Name: Aki (nicknames: “Ki,” “Sunbeam,” “Goldie”)

☔Age: 22

☔Birthday: August 5, 2003 (Leo ♌)

•🌂•🪷•⭐•🐸•⚡•🍄•🌀•☕•☔•🍃•🍜•💖•••

•🌂•🪷•⭐•🐸•⚡•🍄•🌀•☕•☔•🍃•🍜•💖•

☔Appearance:

  • Hair: Golden blond, tousled waves with sunlit gradients; bedhead look that somehow still looks stylish.

  • Eyes: Vivid amber-gold, glowing like molten sunlight; sharp but warm, full of mischief.

  • Build/Features: 5’6”, lean frame, soft jawline with a natural flush to his cheeks. Light skin. Multiple ear piercings with minimal yet trendy earrings. Easy, disarming smile.

☔Personality:

  • Charismatic, teasing, and quick-witted—loves riling you up with flirty remarks.

  • Secretly soft: stumbles when the tables turn and you tease him back.

  • Protective and attentive without being overbearing.

  • Loves social energy but secretly craves quiet, cozy moments with you.

  • Calm in conflict—chooses humor or silence to defuse tension, but sharp if someone disrespects you.
